name: Impossible Garden Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease a pie plate measuring 9 x 11 inches.
3. Evenly distribute the zucchini, tomato, onion, and grated Parmesan in the pie plate.
4. In a blender, beat the remaining ingredients for 15 seconds on high.
5. Pour the mixture evenly over the vegetables in the pie plate.
6. Bake for about 35 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean. Let stand for 5 minutes before cutting.
7. Garnish with tomato and zucchini slices if desired.
Note: For a full recipe, use a quart-sized square or round casserole dish. Decrease Parmesan cheese to two tablespoons and divide the remaining ingredients by half. Reduce bake time to about 30 minutes. For an Impossible Chicken Garden Pie, add 2 cans (5 oz each) of drained chicken chunks or 1 cup of cooked, cut-up chicken to the vegetables.
